dialogue: You discover a recently abandoned campsite.
The fire pit is still warm.
But there are no bodies and no survivors.

choices.lockedText: The ground is too disturbed to read.

dialogue: Most supplies are gone.
A half-finished meal sits beside the fire.
Whatever happened was sudden.

choices.text: Look for a direction of travel

dialogue: You find a spent shell casing near a tree.
Just one.
Not enough to explain an entire camp disappearing.
The trail leads to a nearby farmhouse.
The front door hangs open.

choices.lockedText: You can't find a safe position.

dialogue: After several minutes, you spot movement.
A survivor peeks through an upstairs window.
Then disappears.
Inside are several frightened survivors.
They're the missing campers.
'We thought raiders found us,' one explains.
'So we hid.'

choices.text: Tell them the campsite is safe

dialogue: The survivors eventually invite you inside.
Fear, not violence, caused the disappearance.
The survivors cautiously return to their campsite.
Life goes on, at least for another day.
The farmhouse doors are secured.
The survivors choose safety over comfort.
The mystery remains unsolved.
Not every story gets an ending.
